hooks.command: cd "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)" || exit 1; test -d apps/draft-assistant/frontend/node_modules || exit 0; staged_files=$(mktemp); trap 'rm -f "$staged_files"' EXIT; git diff --name-only --cached -- apps/draft-assistant/frontend/ > "$staged_files"; pnpm --filter @ff/draft-assistant-frontend run fmt 2>&1; pnpm --filter @ff/draft-assistant-frontend run lint:fix 2>&1; while IFS= read -r file; do test -e "$file" && git add -- "$file"; done < "$staged_files"; pnpm --filter @ff/draft-assistant-frontend run fmt:check 2>&1 && pnpm --filter @ff/draft-assistant-frontend run lint 2>&1

cd "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)" || exit 0; test -d apps/draft-assistant/frontend/node_modules || exit 0; sync_failed=0; for s in ktc:sync flock:sync fp:sync fc:sync ffc:sync sleeper:stats:sync nflverse:player-stats:sync nflverse:pfr:sync nflverse:ngs:sync nflverse:ff-opp:sync nflverse:draft-picks:sync nflverse:combine:sync nflverse:rosters:sync espn:rosters:sync; do pnpm --filter @ff/draft-assistant-frontend run "$s" 2>&1 || sync_failed=1; done; if test "$sync_failed" -eq 0; then git diff --quiet -- apps/draft-assistant/frontend/src/assets/ || { git add apps/draft-assistant/frontend/src/assets/ && git commit -m "chore: refresh data assets before push"; }; else git restore apps/draft-assistant/frontend/src/assets/ 2>/dev/null || true; fi; exit 0
